title: Geo's sword
description: Custom sword that work using Custom Names !
body:
# ⚠️How it works!⚠️
**You need 1.21.4 and upward, then rename your sword to one on the list don't make a spelling mistake It WILL no show up**

# 10 Models 9 Names

## Any type of sword
